text.content: Implement the full RAG pipeline using pgvector and nomic-embed-text (768-dim). This realises TKT-0104 T4 (Long-Term Semantic Memory). Scope: (1) Add pgvector extension to Postgres: CREATE EXTENSION vector. (2) Create knowledge_chunks and knowledge_documents tables (schema from TKT-0104): knowledge_documents(id, title, source_path, classification, pii_present, quality_score, provenance, ingested_at, expires_at, tenant_id), knowledge_chunks(id, document_id, chunk_index, content, embedding vector(768), classification, pii_present, quality_score, created_at, expires_at, tenant_id). HNSW index on embedding column. (3) Deploy nomic-embed-text via Ollama (already installed): ollama pull nomic-embed-text. (4) Build ingestion pipeline: scripts/ingest-document.sh <file_path> — reads file, PII scans, chunks (RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter 400-600 tokens, 10-20% overlap), embeds via nomic-embed-text, stores to pgvector. (5) Build retrieval query: scripts/rag-search.sh <query> <limit> — embeds query, cosine similarity search on knowledge_chunks, returns top-k with metadata. (6) Seed initial knowledge base: RULES.md, AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, Model3-Policy.md, Nexus-Access-Policy-v1.0.md, TKT-0104 doc, TKT-0046 doc. (7) Wire retrieval into Yoda heartbeat for relevant context injection. Dependencies: TKT-0164 (Postgres), TKT-0170 (PII scanner). This ticket: separate from TKT-0153 (Yoda semantic memory on MinIO). Owner: Forge (pipeline), Atlas (schema). DoD: pgvector live, ingestion pipeline working, initial 6 docs seeded, retrieval tested.
